themes.headline: Closed at ₹7.7T AUM, market share 11.5%; equity-oriented 65.7% (vs industry 57.1%)
Industry hit ₹67T AUM; unique investors crossed 50M; folios surpassed 210M
Highest-ever quarterly active equity flows: ₹1,331 bn (₹368 bn from NFOs = 28%)
themes.detail: H1 FY25 active equity flows already exceeded full-year FY24 (₹2.45T vs ₹2.37T).

themes.headline: Unique investors with us: 11.8M; SIP/STP ₹36.8 bn vs ₹22.4 bn YoY
themes.detail: 89% of investors have SIPs > 5 years; 82% > 10 years — high stickiness.

themes.headline: SIP contribution ₹245 bn for Sep '24 — highest ever
themes.detail: Marks the inflection in monthly SIP run-rate.

quotes.text: 89% of our investors have registered their SIPs for over 5 years and 82% for over 10 years.
quotes.speaker: Simal Kanuga, CIRO
